title: obione alexandrina
intro: Obione alexandrina, also known as Alexanders or Smyrnium olusatrum, is a plant species in the carrot family, native to the Mediterranean region and parts of Europe. The medicinal properties of Obione alexandrina include its ability to stimulate digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an expectorant. The health benefits of consuming this plant include relief from bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory conditions, as well as its potential to aid in the treatment of digestive issues such as indigestion and constipation. Obione alexandrina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its seeds and roots can be used in culinary dishes, although caution should be exercised due to its potential toxicity.
